expectations.text: Defines review scope using all uncommitted changed files rather than only phase-touched files
Includes a Review Scope Coverage block with Total Changed (Uncommitted) Files, Total Reviewed Files, Missing Files, and Missing File List
Includes Excluded Files and Completion Gate lines in the Review Scope Coverage template
expectations.evidence: Found Excluded Files and Completion Gate

expectations.text: States that Missing Files > 0 means code review is incomplete unless explicitly deferred/approved
